emails.subject: Re: 12-7-00 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 12-7-00 Checkout Mike is entering that deal right now. I'll get back to you with the deal number. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/07/2000 03:11 PM

emails.subject: 12-7-00 Checkout
emails.body: 12-7-00 Checkout I am missing the following deal for Mike Swerzbin brokered through Prebon: Enron sells to Morgan 25 mw of Mid-C for Jan'01 at $700.00

emails.body: Hi Kate, ref 476601 Tom Alonso Prebon shows this deal as Enron buying and Morgan selling Kate Symes ECT 12/07/2000 05:10 PM
